description: CompositionCotton blend FittingComfort Wash Care Normal hand wash or machine washA funky white short sleeved, button down polo t-shirt with a hint of colour on the collar. This t-shirt is ideal for use at the gym and Sports club. A cool buy that's a hot favorite with everyone. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
